name: Slew rate limiter
description: This algorithm is a simple slew rate limiter, offering both logarithmic and linear slew. You can choose to use a single slew rate for both rising and falling signals, or specify them separately. You can also choose to use the same rates for all the busses, or specify them individually.
use_cases: Creating smooth transitions between CV values
gui_description: Simple interface for controlling slew rate limiting with shared and per-channel parameters.

parameters.name: Through
parameters.description: If enabled, the algorithm behaves as if all slew times were set to zero.

parameters.name: Up/shared slew
parameters.description: The slew time for both, or only rising, signals.

parameters.name: Down slew
parameters.description: The slew time for falling signals.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Chooses Logarithmic or Linear slew rate limiting.

parameters.name: Control
parameters.description: Chooses which controls will set the slew times.

parameters.name: Up/shared slew
parameters.description: The slew time for both, or only rising, signals.

parameters.name: Down slew
parameters.description: The slew time for falling signals.

output_ports.name: Output
output_ports.description: The output bus. If set to 'None', the input bus is used as output, and the mode is always 'Replace'.

output_ports.name: Output mode
output_ports.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.
